blockers.description: Search Console — atlas.opsman@gmail.com not added as property user. Blocks SCC/HUSA and Newton SEO data.
blockers.action: Google Search Console → Settings → Users and Permissions → Add atlas.opsman@gmail.com

blockers.description: OAuth re-auth blocked — redirect_uri_mismatch. 127.0.0.1 callback not registered in Google Cloud Console OAuth credentials.
blockers.action: Go to console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client → Add http://127.0.0.1 to Authorized redirect URIs. Takes 30 seconds.

blockers.description: VERCEL_TOKEN not stored — Atlas cannot trigger manual deploys or verify env vars without Chrome attached.
blockers.action: vercel.com/account/tokens → create token → add VERCEL_TOKEN to ~/.openclaw/.env
